name: formatRelativeDate and getRelativeDateParts diverge for 7-29 day range
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-08b] formatRelativeDate returns raw day count for 7-29 days while getRelativeDateParts buckets into weeks; the two documented-aligned helpers diverge. Fix: align bucketing.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: formatRelativeDate uses raw day-count output for 7-29 days while getRelativeDateParts already buckets 7-13 as lastWeek and 14-29 as weeks, so callers of the two documented-aligned helpers disagree for the same dates. Variants: (a) 7-13 days use the same last-week bucket semantics, (b) 14-29 days use week-count semantics, (c) under-7-day and 30+-day behavior stays consistent with the documented contract. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/lib/format-relative-date.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, replacing the old 14d expectation with aligned week-bucket assertions for 7, 13, 14, and 29 days.
